title: moniera calycina
intro: Moniera calycina, also known as Indian pennywort, is a tropical herb native to the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Moniera calycina include reducing oxidative stress, improving cognitive function, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and depression. Moniera calycina is often prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or extract, and is also used in traditional Indian cooking and as a garnish in salads.
